description: Copper Point of Sale is open and requires a full configuration for a new store location based on the requirements in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\store_specs.txt. Set up the installation for 'Meridian Goods & Supply' (4720 Commerce Parkway, Suite 100, Cleveland, OH 44135, phone: (216) 555-0294). Configure the receipts with the header 'Premium Quality, Fair Prices', the footer 'Thank you for shopping Meridian Goods! Returns accepted within 21 days with receipt. meridiangoodssupply.com', and enabled date/time printing. Set the general tax rate to 8.00% and define inventory categories for 'Food & Grocery' (0.00% tax), 'Electronics & Tech' (9.50% tax), 'Apparel' (8.00% tax), and 'Gift Cards' (0.00% tax). Ensure 'Check' is an available payment method. Verify the setup by recording the details of a cash sale for a 'Varsity Top Test' item (Apparel category, $60.00 price, 8% tax) to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\tax_verification.txt, including the item name, price, tax rate, tax amount, and total.
